module_handover.implementation_summary: 1. pm-planner-agent.md: "## Preflight Dependency Rule" + "## PM Planner Retry Limit" 섹션 추가. 2. qa-agent.md: "## Round-trip Gate" (failure_signature=RT:round_trip_missing) + "## Codex Review Gate 차단 조건" (failure_signature=CR:unresolved_finding) 섹션 추가. 3. pipeline-manager-agent.md: "## Codex Review Gate 절차" + "## Phase CI Batching" 섹션 추가. 기존 frontmatter 및 기존 콘텐츠 보존 (IMP-C0FC 원칙).

self_check.docstring: PASS — 각 섹션에 목적 설명 포함
